channel.title: Maria Cecilia | Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content on Maria Cecilia | Portfolio

item.title: Documentation Audit for Veryfi
item.description:
Problem

The Veryfi product documentation had accrued a significant ‘maintainance debt’.

A growing product range resulted in the following issues:

  • A very large docs set
  • Duplicated content
  • Outdated information
  • Inconsistent style and formatting

Solution

I produced an audit report that highlighted the problems, their impact and solutions to implement.

The report is organised in 3 main sections, which correspond to the 3 products developed by Veryfi.

Live docs link

You can view the audit report

item.title: Government documentation
item.description:
Problem

The National Director General for Aliens Policing is the Hungarian authority that examines foreigners to live in Hungary. Their website is the official source of documentation that foreigners rely on when making visa, residency, asylum or citizenship applications.

In February 2025, the NDGCP issued the following government factsheet/administrative update.It’s purpose was to communicate the change in procedure.

I noticed the following issues:

  • Formatting: small font, overuse of bold type, chunky paragraphs
  • Long sentences
  • Lack of structure
  • Unclear who the target is
  • Long and confusing title

The Solution

I edited and re-designed the government circular with respect to document design principles.

item.title: REST API documentation for a mock delivery company
item.description:
Problem

A delivery company has just launched their REST API. They need documentation that can be used by various stakeholders.

Solution

  • I tested the API using Postman to make sure all endpoints were working as expected.
  • Created API reference documentation using the Open API Specification (OAS) 3.0
  • Hosted the complete API reference and concept documentation on Gitbook.

Live docs link

View the Mock Delivery API documentation

The API was created by Wisdom Nwokocha, creator of the Technical Writing Mentorship Program.

item.title: Product documentation
item.description:
Problem

A new Javascript framework called Refract has been released. The team behind it needs developer documentation created in order to gain widespread adoption.

Solution

I created a full documentation site using Docusaurus + Netlify + Git.

I focused on improving findability. To achieve this, I:

  • Designed a clear Information Architecture (IA).
  • Included search capability with Algolia to support developers who read information this way.
  • Added llms.txt to enhance docs findability for AI agents.
  • Converted developer pain points into docs content for maximum impact.

As a bonus, I designed the visual identity for the product and implemented it using custom CSS.
